name: Beef Stew W/Sun-Dried Tomatoes
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 pounds new potatoes (about 12), cut in half
12 pearl onions, cut in half if large (or 1 medium onion cut into 8 wedges)
recipeInstructions:
1. Rehydrate tomatoes as directed on the package; drain and coarsely chop.
2. Mix all ingredients, except for 1/4 cup water and the flour, in a crockpot.
3. Cover and cook on low heat setting for 8 to 9 hours or until vegetables and beef are tender.
4. Mix water and flour together; gradually stir into the beef mixture.
5. Cover and cook on high heat setting for 10 to 15 minutes or until slightly thickened.
6. Remove the bay leaf before serving.
